authState: Clerk session JWT expired in saved auth-state.json — portfolio/billing/launch accessible, company pages show 'Not authenticated' fallback

VAL-CROSS-001.description: Full navigation cycle: portfolio → dashboard → team → settings → dashboard → portfolio
VAL-CROSS-001.evidence: All 6 URLs resolve correctly (no 404 or redirect). Each page loads within 5s. Screenshots at each step confirm correct URL.

VAL-CROSS-002.description: Sidebar nav links work on every page
VAL-CROSS-002.evidence: Company pages show 'Not authenticated' fallback — sidebar requires loaded company data. Cannot verify sidebar link functionality without authenticated access to company pages.
VAL-CROSS-002.blocker: Clerk session JWT expired in auth-state.json

VAL-CROSS-003.evidence: Navigated portfolio → billing → launch, then 2 back presses returned correctly: launch → billing → portfolio. Each press returned to expected URL with content rendered.

VAL-CROSS-004.description: Direct URL access for all pages
VAL-CROSS-004.evidence: All 6 URLs load directly: /portfolio, /company/{id}, /company/{id}/team, /company/{id}/settings, /billing, /launch. No 404s or unexpected redirects.

VAL-CROSS-008.evidence: Toggled to dark → navigated through portfolio, launch, company/*, team, settings — all pages maintained dark class and rgb(18,16,16) background. Toggled back to light — all pages showed rgb(238,238,238). localStorage.theme confirmed matching.

VAL-CROSS-009.description: Factory design system applied on all pages
VAL-CROSS-009.evidence: All pages verified: Geist font loaded (document.fonts.check('16px Geist') = true), body background rgb(238,238,238), body color rgb(2,2,2), --brand=#ee6018, --accent-orange=#ee6018. Billing page has 7 orange accent elements, launch page has 7 orange accent elements.

VAL-CROSS-010.evidence: Inline <script> in <head> reads localStorage and applies dark class before first paint: try{var d=document.documentElement,t=localStorage.getItem('theme');if(t==='dark')d.classList.add('dark')}catch(e){}. Dark preference reloaded without white flash.

VAL-CROSS-011.description: Dark mode consistent across all pages and components
VAL-CROSS-011.evidence: All pages in dark mode verified: body bg rgb(18,16,16) warm dark, text rgb(238,238,238), cards rgb(26,23,22) no white backgrounds. --border=#3d3734 warm tone, --brand=#ee6018 unchanged. Screenshots of billing, portfolio, launch, company pages all show proper dark theming.

VAL-DESIGN-012.evidence: Launch page section labels ('How much shaping do you want?', 'What Opus will produce before launch', 'Tokens') are uppercase with text-accent-orange but use Geist (sans) not Geist Mono. The .section-label class (with font-mono) exists in CSS but is used on authenticated dashboard pages only. Company dashboard pages are blocked by auth.

VAL-DESIGN-016.evidence: Billing page 'Upgrade to Pro' and 'Enable' buttons have stripe-hover class. ::after pseudo-element has repeating-linear-gradient(45deg,...), position:absolute, opacity:0 (shows on hover). CSS rule .stripe-hover confirmed in stylesheets.

VAL-DESIGN-027.evidence: Launch page has 4 orange uppercase section labels (text-accent-orange + uppercase). The .section-label class with ::before orange dot exists in CSS but requires authenticated dashboard pages to verify. Launch page uses inline Tailwind classes instead.

VAL-DESIGN-033.evidence: No data-slot='badge' elements found on accessible pages (portfolio, billing, launch). Status badges appear on authenticated company pages only. Cannot verify badge font-mono + uppercase styling.

VAL-DESIGN-044.evidence: globals.css uses var(--radius-xl), var(--radius-sm), var(--radius-md), var(--radius-lg) for border-radius. Cards compute to 16px (from --radius-xl). Tokens defined: --radius=.75rem, --radius-sm=calc(.75rem-4px), --radius-md=calc(.75rem-2px), --radius-lg=.75rem, --radius-xl=calc(.75rem+4px). No hardcoded values except 9999px (pills) and 50% (circles).

VAL-CHAT-001.blocker: Clerk session JWT expired — company dashboard shows 'Not authenticated' error, chat panel requires loaded company data

VAL-MOBILE-001.evidence: At 768px viewport, no <aside> element found (sidebar hidden). Content fills viewport width. Portfolio page full-width confirmed. Company error fallback also renders full-width.

VAL-MOBILE-002.blocker: Company page shows 'Not authenticated' — chat button requires loaded company data

VAL-MOBILE-003.description: Mobile chat slide-over closes on backdrop
VAL-MOBILE-003.blocker: Company page shows 'Not authenticated' — chat requires loaded company data

summary.blockerDetails: 11 assertions blocked by expired Clerk session JWT in auth-state.json. All blocked assertions require authenticated access to company dashboard pages (sidebar, chat panel, badges). The auth state file has valid cookie expiry dates (2027) but the JWT tokens inside the __session cookie have been rotated/expired by Clerk.

preExistingIssues.description: __name is not defined console errors on all pages (Clerk SDK + Cloudflare Workers deployment issue)
